ideals: I addressed challenges with cunning, subterfuge, or deceit
I expressed my heritage, background, or beliefs through my actions
I talked or slipped my way out of a charged situation
system.secondWind: Regain all effort when your actions get you in trouble with someone or something powerful.

specialAbility.name: Special Ability
specialAbility.effect: When you're exhausted, get +1d and increased effect on sneak.

powers.name: Mirrormask
powers.description: You can always tell if someone is lying if you can see their face. At chapter III, you only need to hear someone's voice or read something they have written.

powers.name: Mercurio
powers.description: You can change your appearance completely by spending 1 effort. You must appear as Kin. Effect lasts until you camp or eat/drink. While active, get a knack for impersonating your new form. At chapter III, no effort cost if used once a scene.

powers.name: Mockingbird
powers.description: You get a knack for mimicking sounds or voices.

powers.name: Fast Friends
powers.description: 2/session - Automatically treat your next charm action roll as a 6. Effects last: I: 1 minute. II hour. III whole day. After duration, target(s) realize they were manipulated.

powers.name: The Big Show
powers.description: Critical hits on excel, charm, or sneak actions regain 2 effort for all party members who witness your feats.

powers.name: Habitual Line Stepper
powers.description: 2/session - Instantly disappear and reappear: I: Nearby. II two or three hundred paces. III a mile. Shunted back if destination is occupied.

powers.name: Quickfingers
powers.description: 1/session - Name a number of objects nearby equal to chapter number. By start of next scene, you have them. If stolen, the person finds out within the hour.

powers.name: Ridi Pagliacci
powers.description: You can invoke each of your burdens instead of spending 1 effort, once a session for each burden.

powers.name: Exeunt
powers.description: When you lead an action to flee or escape trouble, don't spend effort.

powers.name: Step of the Smiling Few
powers.description: 1/session - Increase the power of your next Sneak action to superpowered.

powers.name: Gambit of the Laughing God
powers.description: Take a power from another Bond.

gearKits.name: Adventurer's Kit
items: Lantern, pack, bedroll, rope, flint and tinder, journal, rations, cooking pot, knife, canvas tent

gearKits.name: Entertainer's Kit
items: Instrument, fancy outfit, three free meals, tome of song lore, tickets to a show, knowledge of local haunts, free entry and lodging

gearKits.name: Rake's Kit
items: Hooded lantern, lock picks, paramour's portrait, concealed weapon, loaded dice, gaming set, three extra outfits, disguise kit

gearKits.name: Trickster's Kit
items: Someone else's pocket contents, ball bearings, official looking uniform, fire starter, very convenient key, large pouch of mysterious powder
